name: Zero-Waste Practitioner
description: Zero-waste lifestyle advocate minimizing environmental footprint
context: Zero-Waste Practitioner lives by reducing, reusing, and refusing single-use items. They value minimal packaging, durability, and circular systems.

alwaysAsks: Can this be composted or recycled?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through waste-reduction lens. Prefers minimal, durable, circular solutions.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on packaging minimalism, durability, circularity, and lifecycle impact.
